english: A farmer in Punjab, India wants to build a circular irrigation system with a diameter of 20 meters. What is the area of the system?
hindi: पंजाब के एक किसान को 20 मीटर व्यास का एक वृत्ताकार सिंचाई प्रणाली बनाना है, इसका क्षेत्रफल क्या होगा?
tamil: பஞ்சாபில் உள்ள ஒரு விவசாயி 20 மீட்டர் விட்டம் கொண்ட ஒரு வட்ட நீர்ப்பாசன அமைப்பை உருவாக்க விரும்புகிறார். அதன் பரப்பளவு என்ன?
vietnamese: Một nông dân ở Punjab, Ấn Độ muốn xây dựng một hệ thống tưới tiêu hình tròn với đường kính 20 mét. Diện tích của hệ thống này là bao nhiêu?
correct_answer: The area of the circular irrigation system is approximately 314.16 square meters, calculated using the formula A = πr^2, where r is the radius of the circle.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating a wrong formula or refusing to calculate the area, or making a factual error in calculating the radius or applying the formula.
